blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the refund logic for handling FX differences.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of refund logic that handles foreign exchange (FX) differences, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or details regarding how FX differences are managed during refunds. While the use case mentions that the refund logic should be policy-aware and record differences in the ledger, there are no concrete examples or evidence of this functionality being tested or validated. Therefore, the status is blocked due to inconclusive evidence regarding the requirement.
